scripts.build:site: npm run build && esbuild web/main.js --bundle --outfile=site-dist/app.js --format=iife --target=chrome110 && cp web/index.html web/get-extension.html web/contact.html web/style.css site-dist/ && rm -f site-dist/time-turner-extension.zip && cd extension && zip -rq ../site-dist/time-turner-extension.zip manifest.json popup.html popup.css dist -x '*.DS_Store'
